diffCoverage.notes: New zalo/ layer is the sole zca-rust boundary; lib.rs only declares the module. Cargo.toml adds the pinned git dep + tokio; Cargo.lock is the resolved lockfile.

findings.evidence: Credentials is re-exported from zca-rust, which intentionally does not derive Debug; the wrapper never logs imei/cookie/user_agent values, matching the secrets rule in AGENTS.md.
findings.fix: Keep credential values out of logs/echo when credential-import and store layers are added.

findings.evidence: zca-rust pinned to rev 08698e1c with rustls TLS (no native bindings), so no new-native-binding ADR is required; git-dep choice already accepted as decision d2.
findings.fix: Bump the pinned rev deliberately with a follow-up build when upgrading zca-rust.

summary: zca-rust wired as a pinned, rustls-only git dependency behind a single zalo/ layer that wraps Zalo::new().login() and re-exports the API facade. Forward-only layering holds (lib.rs only declares the module; nothing higher than zalo is added yet). No credentials are persisted or logged, and no real network login is attempted. Attested cargo build + clippy -D warnings + cargo test all pass. Safe to mark done.
